mapper.select:
SELECT NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "MEMBER" WHERE "MEMBER_DEL_FL" = 'N'), 0) AS "userCount",
(SELECT NVL( LPAD(TRUNC(AVG("PUSH_TIME")/60), 2, '0') || ':' || LPAD(MOD(TRUNC(AVG("PUSH_TIME")), 60), 2, '0'), '00:00') FROM "PUSH" WHERE "IS_ACTIVE" = 'Y') AS "avgPushTime",
(SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG("PREPARE_TIME"), 1), 0) FROM "PUSH" WHERE "IS_ACTIVE" = 'Y') AS "avgPrepareTime",
(SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG("SPARE_TIME"), 1), 0) FROM "PUSH" WHERE "IS_ACTIVE" = 'Y') AS "avgTrafficTime" FROM DUAL
